label: Monocyte
evidence: Gopee et al. (2024) identify monocytes as part of the immune cell compartment in prenatal skin (Supplementary Table 3). Suo et al. (2022) distinguished three monocyte subsets in prenatal tissues: CXCR4hi, CCR2hi, and IL1Bhi, with the latter representing peripheral tissue-matured monocytes. In the Gopee et al. atlas, monocytes are present throughout gestation as mesoderm-derived immune cells.
